title: Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk User Behavior Analytics - May 2026
description: Third-Party Package Updates in Splunk User Behavior Analytics - May 2026
solution:
Upgrade Splunk User Behavior Analytics to version 5.4.5, or higher.
Product Status
Product
Base Version
Affected Version
Fix Version
Splunk User Behavior Analytics
5.4
Below 5.4.5
5.4.5
